reviews.review_description: Good graphics 3d, no instructions, no way to reset the 24 boxes, saves data in the cloud boxes still keep count in the cloud switching to a 2nd headset.

reviews.review_title: This gives that lovely Christmas Feeling
reviews.review_description:
I love Christmas.
This little VR App puts you in Santa's Sleigh. It's really simple. You look at a door and if it is in order then Rudolph and the other reindeer will take you up to it where you will receive a little digital gift.
The music is warming. The environments have lots to see. Everything about this app makes me smile.
Merry Christmas - Ho Ho Ho.
